content: KAPLAY is the maintained fork/successor of abandoned Kaboom.js (Replit). kaboom() is a deprecated alias for kaplay(). v3001 is the stable, Kaboom-compatible line with NO breaking changes (only deprecations like curAnim->getCurAnim, Event->KEvent). v4000 is the newer line that introduces breaking changes and new features. Tutorials/snippets found online may target Kaboom or mix v3001/v4000 APIs, causing copy-paste breakage. Pin one version when vendoring.
